economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business entities including Siksika Resource Developments Ltd (SRDL) with numerous wholly owned subsidiaries including energy, hospitality, telecommunications, and agricultural operations. Siksika Nation Holdings LP operates food/beverage, industrial park, construction contracting, and other business divisions.
notes: Combined financial statements include only operating entities; trust entities are excluded. Nation business entities (SRDL and SNHLP and subsidiaries) are accounted for using modified equity method — loss from business enterprises of $3,569,403 recorded separately. Comparative 2019 figures have been restated (Note 25). A separate set of consolidated financial statements also exists prepared in accordance with full PSAB standards. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + FNIH + CMHC + Community Futures Treaty Seven + First Nation Development Fund + Band capital funds + Band revenue funds + Grants = 59571044+13941704+1320390+2871797+1167622+370848+2806002+24167484 = 106217. Recalculated: 59571044+13941704+1320390+2871797+1167622+370848+2806002+24167484 = 106216891. osr recalculated as 124439018-106216891=18222127. Values updated accordingly.
